---
title: Contact Us
page-layout: full
body-classes: contact-page
---

<div class="contact-hero">
  <h1>Get in Touch</h1>
  <p>
    Have a question about GSO, workshops, or membership?
    Send us a message and we’ll get back to you.
  </p>
</div>

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/xreazrqn" method="POST" class="contact-form">

<div class="top-row">
  <input type="text" name="name" placeholder="Your Name *" required>
  <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="Your Email *" required>
</div>

<input type="text" name="subject" placeholder="Subject">

<textarea name="message" placeholder="Your Message *" required></textarea>

<div class="donate-btn-wrapper">
  <button type="submit" class="donate-btn">Send Message</button>
</div>

</form>
